steps.action: Master Arm switch – ARM (UP)
steps.voiced: Master Arm to ARM.

steps.action: Master Mode – A/G
steps.voiced: Select A/G master mode.

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
steps.voiced: Select the SMS page.

steps.action: Click on the desired bomb to select it (82B)
steps.voiced: Select the MK-82 on the SMS page.

steps.action: We will create a weapon delivery program by selecting a preset program. Toggle programs with the OSB next to PROG. We will use PROG 2. STEP is used to change selected station
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to PROG and select your delivery program.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to MODE, then click on OSB to select AUTO Mode
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to MODE and select AUTO.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to MFUZ (Mechanical Fuze), then press on OSB next to NOSE.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to MFUZ, then select NOSE.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to EFUZ (Electronic Fuze), then press on OSB next to DLY1 for a delay if desired, otherwise set to INST.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to EFUZ, then set INST or DLY1 as required.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to DRAG, then press on OSB next to either FF (Free-Falling low-drag bomb) or RET (retarded fuze) based on your bomb type.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to DRAG, then select FF or RET for your bomb type.

steps.action: Click on OSB next to « UFC » to activate the UFC keypad for the STORES page
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to UFC to activate the keypad.

steps.action: Click on the OSB next to QTY (« : » means option is selected), type « 2 » on the UFC keypad, then press « ENT » (« : » means option is selected) to set 2 bombs per release.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to QTY, enter quantity on the UFC, then press ENT.

steps.action: Click on the OSB next to MULT (« : » means option is selected), type « 1 » on the UFC keypad, then press « ENT » to set 1 bomb to be released simultaneously from weapon stations
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to MULT, enter multiplier on the UFC, then press ENT.

steps.action: Click on the OSB next to INT (« : » means option is selected), type « 500 » on the UFC keypad, then press « ENT » to set a 500 ft bomb impact spacing.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to INT, enter impact spacing in feet on the UFC, then press ENT.

steps.action: To slave your TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) to your HUD, press the Sensor Control Switch FWD.
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch FWD to slave the TDC to the HUD.

steps.action: You will see the « ball and chain » appear. In order to create a reference point for the CCRP, we will have to designate a specific point in space with the TDC.
steps.voiced: Confirm ball and chain appears. Ready to designate the CCRP reference point.

steps.action: Enter a 25 deg dive to the target and set your velocity vector on the target.
steps.voiced: Enter a 25 degree dive

steps.action: Once velocity vector is on the target, press the TDC Depress (« Enter ») to designate your CCRP reference point.
steps.voiced: Put the velocity vector on target and TDC Depress to designate.

steps.action: Slew your TD (Target Designator) with the TDC controls to adjust your CCRP reference point properly.
steps.voiced: Slew the TD with TDC to refine the reference point if needed.

steps.action: Fly level and keep your velocity vector aligned with the ASL (Azimuth Steering Line) and above the Pull- Up cue.
steps.voiced: Fly level, keeping the velocity vector on the ASL, above the pull-up cue.

steps.action: When release cue appears, hold the Weapon Release Button (« RALT+SPACE ») until all bombs in the pass have been released.
steps.voiced: When you see the release cue, hold Weapon Release until all bombs are off.

steps.action: Pull up before velocity vector reaches the PULL UP cue.
steps.voiced: Pull up, get off the target.
